response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial initiative as a founder, his profile aligns more with a hands-on generalist Staff Engineer rather than a Director-level AI strategist. He lacks the preferred advanced degree in AI and the deeply recognized, long-term AI platform expertise required to drive strategic differentiation and advise enterprise customers at a Principal level.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software and infrastructure engineering experience.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial initiative as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform (GISCollective).
Solid cloud and infrastructure builder background with Kubernetes, AWS, and microservices.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic AI platform development experience critical for this role.
Experience is primarily as a hands-on Senior/Staff Developer, lacking the Director-level strategic advisory background required.
Does not hold a preferred Master's degree or PhD in an AI-related field.
